title: Grilled Jamaican Aubergine Skewers
description: Tender aubergine marinated in Jamaican spices, grilled to perfection. Perfect for summer evenings with a refreshing drink.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium heat.
2. Cut the aubergine into 1-inch pieces and place them in a large bowl.
3. In a small bowl, mix together jerk seasoning, lime juice, olive oil, cilantro, ginger, and garlic.
4. Pour the marinade over the aubergine and toss to coat.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Thread the aubergine pieces onto skewers.
7. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
8. Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
